title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that coding alone is no longer the differentiator for junior cloud engineers. The best junior developers understand foundational principles like security, reliability, cost, and performance, then use AI agents to accelerate work while reviewing outputs against those fundamentals.
